TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ernest_Brown, title = Ernest_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ernest_Brown} }

S.FORM: Ernest Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 5, Ernest Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ernest Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 5, Ernest Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ernes~ɕt βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ernes~ɕt βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
